value:
Ayush Shakya is a dedicated Computer Science graduate from GLA University with hands-on experience in software development and problem-solving. He has demonstrated strong technical skills through participation in various competitions and presentations, earning recognition such as first and second runner-up awards at IBM events. Currently pursuing his B.Tech with a solid academic record, he is eager to apply his knowledge and skills in innovative technology projects. 

Top Skills: Software Development, Problem Solving, Presentation & Communication, Team Collaboration, Technical Research
